memories.text: User's OpenClaw workflow has four core functions: generate video from multiple uploaded images, verify login status for Douyin/Kuaishou/Xiaohongshu/WeChat Channels and generate QR codes when login is missing or expired, publish generated videos to the logged-in platforms, and manage dedicated input/output folders with weekly cleanup every Monday morning.
When users send multiple images, use the existing image-to-video skill to generate a video.

Before publishing, check login status for Douyin, Kuaishou, Xiaohongshu, and WeChat Channels. If not logged in or session expired, use the existing auth skill to generate a login QR code into a designated directory.

If a platform login is valid and the user asks to publish a video, use the existing publishing skill to upload and publish the video to Douyin, Kuaishou, Xiaohongshu, and WeChat Channels as requested.
Maintain a dedicated directory for uploaded images, a dedicated directory for generated videos, and clean those folders every Monday morning.
